message:
feat(utils): Add zero-copy optimizations - StringInterner + Source Cache

Phase 1: StringInterner utility (src/utils/string_interner.zig)
- Deduplicates Python identifier strings via interning
- Returns same pointer for same string (O(1) equality via ==)
- Includes stats tracking (unique_count, cache_hits, bytes_allocated)

Phase 2: Source file caching (src/import_scanner.zig)
- Adds source_cache field to ImportGraph
- readSourceCached() returns cached content on subsequent reads
- getCachedSource() for checking cache without reading
- Prevents re-reading files during import scanning

Expected impact:
- Memory: 30-50KB savings per compilation
- Speed: 5-10% faster (fewer allocations)
- I/O: 50-70% fewer file reads for multi-file projects

Note: Phase 3 (Arena for Codegen) deferred - requires more careful
refactoring of 296-line cleanup.zig for safe batch deallocation.
